vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural support for the wing's airfoil shape
Include lightening pockets for weight reduction
Feature leading edge sock and trailing edge taper
Incorporate control surface cutouts with hinges
Ensure aerodynamic performance with smooth surfaces
Support integration with wing spar, skin, and control surfaces

risk.desc: Insufficient mass estimation may lead to underweight design.
risk.mit: Review and adjust mass estimates based on detailed component weights.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to missing preload information on some fasteners.
risk.mit: Specify preload values and locking methods for all critical fasteners.

risk.desc: Thermal efficiency may be compromised if cooling inlet design is inadequate.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal simulations to validate cooling inlet effectiveness.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance
Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters)
Spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable
Payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module
Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal
Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g
evidence_features
interface_count
standard_hardware_dimensioning
standard_hardware_dimensioning

risk.desc: Mass exceeds budget due to additional structural reinforcement.
risk.mit: Review structural requirements and optimize design.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface.
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment features and improve assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion affecting fit between components.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in moving joints may cause binding.
risk.mit: Increase clearance in critical interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential for human error in complex assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly procedures and training programs.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing skin to fuselage frames via ribs and carry-through.
Heat generated from sun exposure is dissipated through cooling vents along the spar.
Allows maintenance personnel to access battery bay and payload bay.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for easy removal post-print
manufacturing_strategy.inspection_implications: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, CMM for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.notes: Mass exceeds budget due to additional structural reinforcement.

verification_focus.expected_value: Continuous from spar to fuselage frames
verification_focus.actual_value: Continuous from spar to fuselage frames
verification_focus.notes: Load path verified through ribs and carry-through.
Key fits securely to prevent rotation.

verify.rule: Ensure all required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure cad_brief.mass_est_g is a numeric grams value.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Ensure each interface has a reciprocal declaration in the neighboring subsystem.
Ensure critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential aerodynamic performance degradation due to lightening pockets.
risk.mit: Conduct CFD analysis to validate aerodynamic impact.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at control surface cutout.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis on the cutout area.

risk.desc: Inadequate service access may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access holes.

risk.desc: Misalignment during assembly could affect structural integrity.
risk.mit: Implement more precise alignment features.

risk.desc: Insufficient inspection windows may limit visual inspection.
risk.mit: Add additional inspection windows.

generated_parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
generated_parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

requirements: Provide a housing for the MG90S or DS215MG servo motor
Include a control horn for actuating the elevon control surface
Design a pushrod channel for connecting the servo to the control horn
Enable easy access for maintenance and replacement of the servo motor
Ensure thermal management through cooling fins and integration with the wing structure
Maintain electrical connectivity through harness paths

verify.rule: All required fields are present.
Mass estimate is within acceptable range.
All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to part_tree children and geometry_ops.
Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
Critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to insufficient cooling fins.
risk.mit: Increase number or size of cooling fins.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment marks.
risk.mit: Add alignment marks on mating surfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief geometry.
risk.mit: Implement robust strain relief features.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening bolts leading to structural failure.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and use torque wrench during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress due to non-waterproof removable cover.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals or gaskets on removable cover.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels

physics_paths.description: Elevon servo actuates control surface via pushrod
Heat dissipation from servo to wing structure
Access for maintenance and replacement of servo

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate with wing structure for secure mounting
Connect to flight control electronics for power and signal
Ensure heat transfer to wing structure for cooling
